<!--
Thanks for contributing to deepscroll! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep PRs focused and small — one logical change per PR makes review easier.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check deepscroll` and `mypy deepscroll` are clean
- [ ] Relevant docs (README, docstrings, CHANGELOG) updated
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or private URLs included

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, refs #456, etc. -->
